​Did you know "Embroidery" comes from the Old French broderie, meaning "embellishment"? 🎨 ​But history shows it was more than just a flourish. Long before the runway, stitches were a survival skill—used to patch, reinforce, and breathe new life into worn fabric. It’s the original sustainable fashion. 🌿🧵 ​Swipe for the details. I love how the stray lint settles into the threads—a reminder that this art is meant to be lived in. 🔍✨ #embroi̇deryart #sustainablefashionbrand #craftsmanship #textiledesigners #pixelatedsuti . . . . . [Anime, Naruto, anime tshirt, Custom embroidery, textile art, slow fashion movement, embroidery design, garment detailing, handcrafted patches, ethical fashion, Nagpur, Maharashtra, bespoke apparel, real not fake] Do you wear embroidery for the style 👗 or the durability 🛠️? They said I couldn't, so I made sure the work spoke for itself. 🧵🔥 There is no better fuel than being told "you can't." Every stitch in this video is a reminder that while others are busy talking, I'm busy building. This "Chartered" piece is more than just a design—it’s the proof of the hustle. Watch the process, respect the progress. We're just getting started. 🚀 Drop a "💯" if you’ve ever used doubt as your greatest motivation. . . . . . . . . . .
